Ground truth calculated by analyzing all line totals (UnitPrice * Quantity * (1 - Discount)) from Order Details table in actual Northwind database
Ground truth calculated by analyzing all line totals from Order Details table in actual Northwind database

privileged_info_summary: The Northwind database is Microsoft's well-known real sample database (609,283 Order Details rows). Benford's Law proportions in task.json are accurate: digit 1=0.301 (official 0.30103), digit 2=0.176 (official 0.176091), and similarly for digits 3-9. Ground truth analysis shows actual first-digit distribution from Northwind line totals: digit 1 has 169,292 occurrences (0.2779 proportion), digit 9 has 31,678 occurrences (0.052 proportion). All metadata paths and database structure claims are verified correct.
